recommendations.title: The Amputee
recommendations.overview: A double amputee attempts to write a letter while her nurse gets in the way.

recommendations.title: The Alphabet
recommendations.overview: A woman's dark and absurdist nightmare vision comprising a continuous recitation of the alphabet and bizarre living representations of each letter.

recommendations.title: Eraserhead
recommendations.overview: First-time father Henry Spencer tries to survive his industrial environment, his angry girlfriend, and the unbearable screams of his newly born mutant child.

recommendations.title: The Grandmother
recommendations.overview: To escape neglect and abuse from his parents, a young boy plants some strange seeds and they grow into a grandmother.

recommendations.title: A Touch of Spice
recommendations.overview: "A Touch of Spice" is a story about Fanis, a young Greek boy growing up in Istanbul, whose grandfather, a culinary philosopher and mentor, teaches him that both food and life require a little salt to give them flavor. They both require... A Touch of

recommendations.title: Blue Velvet
recommendations.overview: The discovery of a severed human ear found in a field leads a young man on an investigation related to a beautiful, mysterious nightclub singer and a group of psychopathic criminals who have kidnapped her child.

recommendations.title: WHAT DID JACK DO?
recommendations.overview: In a locked down train station, a homicide detective conducts an interview with a tormented monkey  who is suspected of murder.

recommendations.title: Six Men Getting Sick
recommendations.overview: Lynch's first film project consists of a looping animation of six people vomiting projected on to a special sculptured screen featuring twisted three-dimensional faces.

recommendations.title: The Elephant Man
recommendations.overview: A Victorian surgeon rescues a heavily disfigured man being mistreated by his "owner" as a side-show freak. Behind his monstrous façade, there is revealed a person of great intelligence and sensitivity. Based on the true story of Joseph Merrick (calle

recommendations.title: Inland Empire
recommendations.overview: When actress Nikki Grace gets the lead role in a cursed film, her world becomes more and more surreal, blending realities and ideas of infidelity, reincarnation, and supernatural forces.
